## Checklist

- [ ] Typecheck passes

- [ ] Security checks pass or skipped with reason
- [ ] Docs updated where needed
- [ ] Changelog/release note considered
- [ ] Version bump considered
- [ ] No publish, release, deployment, mirror, or secret-bearing workflow was run for this PR

- [ ] Package metadata, registry links, and generated MCP metadata were checked when touched
